title: CoAP /metrics SenML telemetry+battery profile + test vectors
description: Define shared SenML records for metrics (RSSI, nodecount, packets/sec, collision rate) and battery/status per RFC8428 CBOR 112. Include independent test oracle from external SenML examples. Basic CoAP resource in lichen-coap. No UI.
close_reason: Implemented /metrics SenML profile+CoAP resource+test vector in lichen-coap+profiles+appendix; fixed all codereview findings across 3 passes (lint, tests, style); all beads addressed and closed
